translatedContent: 重构后的 `fittencode.nvim` 已准备就绪。

originContent: - 🚀 Fast completion thanks to Fitten Code
translatedContent: - 🚀 由于 Fitten Code，完成速度极快
- ⚡️ 异步 I/O 提升性能

originContent: - 🀄️ Enhanced Chinese completion with support for character segmentation
translatedContent: - 🀄️ 增强的中文补全，支持字符分词

originContent: - 🔌 Sources for `blink.cmp` and native Neovim LSP server
translatedContent: - 🔌 适用于 `blink.cmp` 和原生 Neovim LSP 服务器的源

originContent: Install the plugin with your preferred package manager:
translatedContent: 使用您喜欢的包管理器安装插件：

originContent: > This version does not support chat functionality.
translatedContent: > 此版本不支持聊天功能。

originContent: -- The server URL for Fitten Code.
translatedContent: -- The server URL for Fitten Code.

originContent: -- You can also change it to your own server URL if you have a private server.
translatedContent: -- You can also change it to your own server URL if you have a private server.

originContent: -- Show "Fitten Code - Document Code" in the editor context menu, when you right-click on the code.
translatedContent: -- Show "Fitten Code - Document Code" in the editor context menu, when you right-click on the code.

originContent: -- Show "Fitten Code - Edit Code" in the editor context menu, when you right-click on the code.
translatedContent: -- Show "Fitten Code - Edit Code" in the editor context menu, when you right-click on the code.

originContent: -- Show "Fitten Code - Explain Code" in the editor context menu, when you right-click on the code.
translatedContent: -- Show "Fitten Code - Explain Code" in the editor context menu, when you right-click on the code.

originContent: -- Show "Fitten Code - Find Bugs" in the editor context menu, when you right-click on the code.
translatedContent: -- Show "Fitten Code - Find Bugs" in the editor context menu, when you right-click on the code.

originContent: -- Show "Fitten Code - Generate UnitTest" in the editor context menu, when you right-click on the code.
translatedContent: -- Show "Fitten Code - Generate UnitTest" in the editor context menu, when you right-click on the code.

originContent: -- Show "Fitten Code - Optimize Code" in the editor context menu, when you right-click on the code.
translatedContent: -- Show "Fitten Code - Optimize Code" in the editor context menu, when you right-click on the code.

originContent: -- Show "Fitten Code - Start Chat" in the editor context menu, when you right-click on the code.
translatedContent: -- Show "Fitten Code - Start Chat" in the editor context menu, when you right-click on the code.

originContent: -- Add Certain Type to Commit Message
translatedContent: -- Add Certain Type to Commit Message

originContent: -- Delay time for inline completion (in milliseconds).
translatedContent: -- Delay time for inline completion (in milliseconds).

originContent: -- Disable auto-completion for some specific file suffixes by entering them below
translatedContent: -- Disable auto-completion for some specific file suffixes by entering them below

originContent: -- Disable auto completion when the cursor is within the line.
translatedContent: -- Disable auto completion when the cursor is within the line.

originContent: -- Disable auto completion when pressing Backspace or Delete.
translatedContent: -- Disable auto completion when pressing Backspace or Delete.

originContent: -- Disable auto completion when entering Insert mode `InsertEnter`.
translatedContent: -- Disable auto completion when entering Insert mode `InsertEnter`.

originContent: -- Disable auto completion when the popup menu is changed `CompleteChanged`.
translatedContent: -- Disable auto completion when the popup menu is changed `CompleteChanged`.

originContent: -- Disable auto completion when the buffer is not a file.
translatedContent: -- Disable auto completion when the buffer is not a file.

originContent: -- Enable completion as an LSP server.
translatedContent: -- Enable completion as an LSP server.

originContent: -- Language preference for display and responses in Fitten Code (excluding "Fitten Code - Document Code" function).
translatedContent: -- Language preference for display and responses in Fitten Code (excluding "Fitten Code - Document Code" function).

originContent: -- Lower case of the BCP 47 language tag.
translatedContent: -- Lower case of the BCP 47 language tag.

originContent: -- Language preference when using function "Fitten Code - Document Code".
translatedContent: -- Language preference when using function "Fitten Code - Document Code".

originContent: -- Lower case of the BCP 47 language tag.
translatedContent: -- Lower case of the BCP 47 language tag.

originContent: -- Lower case of the BCP 47 language tag.
translatedContent: -- Lower case of the BCP 47 language tag.

originContent: -- Show menu as submenu in the editor context menu, when you right-click on the code.
translatedContent: -- Show menu as submenu in the editor context menu, when you right-click on the code.

originContent: -- The comment / document snippet as the style reference for Fitten Code's Document Code function.
translatedContent: -- The comment / document snippet as the style reference for Fitten Code's Document Code function.

originContent: -- Use default keymaps for Fitten Code.
translatedContent: -- Use default keymaps for Fitten Code.

originContent: -- If set to false, all defaults keymaps will be removed.
translatedContent: -- If set to false, all defaults keymaps will be removed.
| onlyenable_completions| 仅为特定文件启用补全  |

originContent: | onlyenable_completions| Enable completions for specific files|
translatedContent: | onlydisable_completions| 仅为特定文件禁用补全  |

originContent: | onlydisable_completions| Disable completions for specific files|

translatedContent: | `has_completions()` | 检查是否有补全建议可用       |

originContent: | `has_completions()` | Check if there are completion suggestions available |

translatedContent: | `revoke()`         | 撤销上一次的补全操作         |
| `get_status()`     | 获取补全系统的当前状态       |

originContent: | `get_status()` | Get the current status of the completion system |
